## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (build + unit + e2e leak tests + jsdom browser test)
- [ ] Ran the sensitive-data sweep — **no real data** in the diff, fixtures, or tests (fixtures use fictional data only, e.g. Contoso Ltd, Fabrikam Inc)
- [ ] No `masking-map.jsonl`, `.bak`, or other secret/local files included
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the unreleased version
- [ ] For a release: all package versions bumped in lockstep
